description: Peppermint is a central hub for your help desk. A powerfully easy system for tracking, prioritising, and solving customer support tickets.
author: BigBearCommunity

tips.before_install:
### Additional Instructions:
After finished installing, open the `app settings` and update the `API_URL` to point it to your Home Server's IP Address.
e.g:
``` http://192.168.31.31:5003
```
### Default credentials:
Username: `admin@admin.com` Password: `1234`

title: Peppermint
